text:
are trying to adapt diets 
according to each person's 
microbiota to help calm symptoms.
HOW CAN I INFLUENCE 
MY MICROBIOTA?
Your microbiota prefers some 
foods to others:
Fiber (fruits, vegetables, legumes, whole grains) → Feed the microbiota. 
These are prebiotics.
Fermented foods (yogurts, kefir, cheese) → Provide probiotics, which 
will strengthen your microbiota.
Nuts and seeds → Rich in fiber and 
antioxidants, they feed and protect the 
microbiota
PROBLEM:  
the presence of IBD sometimes makes consuming 
these foods difficult.
